name: io.github.Ayo-Fam/mcp-search-console
title: MCP Search Console
description: Multi-account Google Search Console MCP: analytics, URL inspection, sitemaps across named accounts.

environmentVariables.name: GSC_ACCOUNTS_CONFIG
environmentVariables.description: Path to accounts.json config file with GSC credentials. Defaults to ~/.config/mcp-search-console/accounts.json

environmentVariables.name: GSC_ALLOW_DESTRUCTIVE
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to enable sitemap submit/delete operations
